node.title: Uber | OA | Count occurrence of one string in another string

topic.title: Uber | OA | Count occurrence of one string in another string

post.content:
Given two strings s and t. Count the number of occurence of 't' in 's' as follows:
* Length of t is 3, 
* Increment count when `t == s[i]s[i+2]s[i+4]`

Example:
s = aabbcc
t = abc
output = 2

Kindly suggest if the below code looks correct.

```
i = 0
while i+4 < len(s):
    t = s[i] + s[i+2] + s[i+4]
    i += 1
print(i)
```
